title: New York's First Vegan Three-Star Restaurant
subtitle: 纽约首家纯素米其林三星诞生

paragraphs.en: New York's Eleven Madison Park has become the first vegan restaurant to be awarded three Michelin stars. The fine dining establishment received its first three-star Michelin rating in 2011 when the menu was famed for its fancy animal-based dishes. However, last year, the restaurant's co-owner and famous chef, Daniel Humm, made the bold decision to remove meat from the menu, citing our unsustainable food system.
paragraphs.zh: 纽约的麦迪逊公园十一号成为首家获米其林三星的纯素餐厅。这家高级餐厅于2011年首次获得米其林三星，当时以其精美的荤菜闻名。然而去年，餐厅合伙人兼名厨丹尼尔·胡姆做出了大胆决定，以当前食品体系不可持续为由，将肉类从菜单中移除。

paragraphs.en: While cow milk is still served for tea and coffee, the menu is almost 100 percent vegan. At the time, Humm acknowledged the move was risky, admitting that it wasn't clear if guests would come, but called the gamble a risk worth taking. In view of the climate crisis, I didn't want to open the same restaurant, Humm told the Financial Times in an interview. If we can show the possibilities of eating plant-based food in this setting, it can open a lot of doors for others to follow.
paragraphs.zh: 虽然茶和咖啡仍提供牛奶，但菜单几乎百分百纯素。当时胡姆承认此举有风险，坦言不确定客人是否会来，但称这次冒险值得一试。胡姆在接受《金融时报》采访时说：“鉴于气候危机，我不想再开一家老样子的餐厅。如果我们能在此环境中展示植物性饮食的可能性，就能为后来者打开许多扇门。”

paragraphs.en: Now, this impressive new accomplishment validates Eleven Madison Park's decision to take meat off the menu and embrace plant-based foods, with Michelin's 2022 New York guide branding it a bold vision of luxury dining. We took the jump to transform Eleven Madison Park into a plant-based fine dining restaurant knowing in our hearts this is what we believed in, stated Humm on Instagram. Last night, we were honored to be awarded three Michelin stars for the 11th year in a row. I am so grateful to the team members who contributed through its nearly 25-year history.
paragraphs.zh: 如今，这一令人瞩目的新成就印证了麦迪逊公园十一号撤掉肉类、拥抱植物性食品的决定，米其林2022年纽约指南称其为“奢华餐饮的大胆愿景”。胡姆在Instagram上写道：“我们毅然将麦迪逊公园十一号转型为植物性高级餐厅，因为我们内心坚信这一点。昨晚，我们荣幸地连续第11年获得米其林三星。我对近25年来做出贡献的团队成员深表感激。”

paragraphs.en: We are also grateful to our guests and partners who believed in our vision and encouraged us to push harder. Three Michelin stars is the highest award, given to chefs who are at the peak of their profession. Their cooking is elevated to an art form and some of their dishes are destined to become classics, reads Michelin's website, in a clear nod to plant-based foods' growing significance in the culinary world. I think luxury companies have a real role to play and a responsibility, says Humm. The more creative we are, the more beautiful and delicious our future will be.
paragraphs.zh: 我们也感谢相信我们愿景并鼓励我们更加努力的客人和合作伙伴。米其林三星是授予处于职业巅峰厨师的最高奖项。米其林官网写道：“他们的烹饪已升华为艺术，其中一些菜肴注定成为经典。”这明确认可了植物性食品在烹饪界日益增长的重要性。胡姆说：“我认为奢侈品牌应发挥真正的作用并承担责任。我们越有创造力，未来就会越美好、越美味。”
